title: [CI] Add check for slang tests missing valgrind marker
body:
Add a CI check to ensure all test files with "REQUIRES: slang" also have "UNSUPPORTED: valgrind" to prevent recurring false positive valgrind errors from circt-verilog (https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/932c062d9232bc1113e3ae6e639ad72be9cdcbfb, https://github.com/llvm/circt/commit/c79d123189ad77b26425093815a45001bde7eeca).  The logic is very naive (whitespace sensitive) but I think that's ok. 

e.g. https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/22742885485/job/65960187012?pr=9854

AI-assisted by Haiku 4.5
